title: NeoNeko
description: NeoNeko is an RPG modpack, featuring new mobs, biomes, and items. Level up, discover unique loot, and face new challenges in a survival-focused world.
body:
# **NeoNeko**: **A Minecraft RPG Adventure**

**Step into a new Minecraft experience with this RPG-themed modpack!** Packed with mods that enhance gameplay with new mobs, biomes, items, and challenging mechanics, this pack takes your survival adventure to the next level. Whether you're exploring new lands or gearing up for epic combat, this modpack is perfect for players who want a more immersive and challenging experience.

## Features:
- **RPG Elements**: Level up, discover unique items, and fight new creatures.
- **Enhanced Combat**: Tackle tougher enemies with improved combat mechanics.
- **New Mobs and Biomes**: Encounter a variety of new creatures and explore diverse landscapes.
- **Custom Loot and Gear**: Find special weapons, armor, and magical items that can give you the edge.
- **Survival Focused**: A challenging experience designed to test your survival skills.

Ready to dive in and see how far you can go? The world of **NeoNeko** is waiting for you!
